project:
4.0.0# this is the root element of the pom.xml file and it defines the project model version com.example # this is the group id of the project, it is usually a reverse domain name to ensure uniqueness java-aws-3tier # this tells us the name of the project 0.1.0 # this is the version number war # this tells maven how to wrap your code java-aws-3tier Sample Java/Tomcat application for AWS 3-tier deployment. # 17 17
app
